name: Sirius XM Holdings Inc.
description: Sirius XM Holdings Inc. is a leading audio entertainment company in North America, providing a wide range of satellite and online radio services. Headquartered in New York City, the company offers a diverse array of content, including music, sports, entertainment, comedy, talk, news, and traffic channels, alongside podcasts and infotainment services. Operating primarily on a subscription-fee basis, SiriusXM serves as a premier programmer and platform for both subscription and digital advertising-supported audio, delivering curated, exclusive, and on-demand programming to millions of listeners across the United States.
